description: Horizons Patch 4 (18 December 2024) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Dropped banners no longer reduce Fortification protection
[MOBILE] Stack and Sort buttons have been restored to the main Inventory menu

sections.searchable_text: Changes Dropped banners no longer reduce Fortification protection [MOBILE] Stack and Sort buttons have been restored to the main Inventory menu

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.description: Wailing Bow has been underperforming in ZvZs despite being the only ability with custom AoE escalation. We have increased the damage escalation per target hit to bring Wailing Bow back to its glory days.

items.text: Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Wailing Bow has been underperforming in ZvZs despite being the only ability with custom AoE escalation. We have increased the damage escalation per target hit to bring Wailing Bow back to its glory days. Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow) Damage to 1st target: 189 → 189 (unchanged) Damage to 2nd target: 236 → 256 Damage to 3rd target: 283 → 323 Damage to 4th or more targets: 331 → 391

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.description: While Dark Matter has high damage potential, it has been too easy to counter. We have decreased its cooldown to improve reliability but have also increased the energy cost to keep the ability's spam potential in check.

items.text: Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs)

subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs While Dark Matter has high damage potential, it has been too easy to counter. We have decreased its cooldown to improve reliability but have also increased the energy cost to keep the ability's spam potential in check. Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs) Cooldown: 20s → 15s Energy cost: 10 → 16

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.description: Sanctify’s unique ability to remove hostile ground effects created by enemies has proven less impactful than anticipated. As a result, we have increased its value as a traditional healing weapon.

items.text: Sanctify (Exalted Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sanctify’s unique ability to remove hostile ground effects created by enemies has proven less impactful than anticipated. As a result, we have increased its value as a traditional healing weapon. Sanctify (Exalted Staff) Healing: 122 → 138 Range: 10m → 12m

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.description: We have given Dreadstorm Monarch’s Eye of the Storm additional damage and resistance reduction to help it command the respect it deserves.

items.text: Eye of the Storm (Dreadstorm Monarch)
Vendetta (Camlann Mace)

subsections.searchable_text: Maces We have given Dreadstorm Monarch’s Eye of the Storm additional damage and resistance reduction to help it command the respect it deserves. Eye of the Storm (Dreadstorm Monarch) 1st & 2nd cast damage: 39 → 50 Resistance reduction: 0.12 → 0.15 Vendetta (Camlann Mace) Cast time: 0.7s → 0.25s Stand time: 0.7s → 0.2s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.description: The previous changes to Soul Link have been a step in the right direction, giving Iron Root players a legitimate reason to use the Ally/Enemy effect. However, with the increase in power, the reduction to the Ally/Ally effect was too conservative. The intent is to maintain the Ally/Ally effect as the powerful and consistent option it has always been.

items.text: Soul Link (Ironroot Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs The previous changes to Soul Link have been a step in the right direction, giving Iron Root players a legitimate reason to use the Ally/Enemy effect. However, with the increase in power, the reduction to the Ally/Ally effect was too conservative. The intent is to maintain the Ally/Ally effect as the powerful and consistent option it has always been. Soul Link (Ironroot Staff) Ally/Ally healing transfer percentage: 50% → 75% 2nd cast stand time: 1s → 0s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.description: We have added more value to the 1st and 2nd casts of Phantom Twin to help the Phantom Twinblade perform more effectively as a DPS Quarterstaff.

items.text: Phantom Twin (Phantom Twinblade)
Separator (all Quarterstaffs)

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs We have added more value to the 1st and 2nd casts of Phantom Twin to help the Phantom Twinblade perform more effectively as a DPS Quarterstaff. Phantom Twin (Phantom Twinblade) Damage per tick: 36 → 41 Slow: 10% → 15% Added missing energy costs: 5/5/7 Separator (all Quarterstaffs) Damage to target: 125 → 157

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.description: Ravenstrikes have become a more viable option now that players are no longer at risk of dying without the ability to stop their own damage. Due to this increased consistency, their damage and speed while channeling have been reduced to give enemies more room to react and recover.

items.text: Earth Crusher (Ravenstrike Cestus)

subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Ravenstrikes have become a more viable option now that players are no longer at risk of dying without the ability to stop their own damage. Due to this increased consistency, their damage and speed while channeling have been reduced to give enemies more room to react and recover. Earth Crusher (Ravenstrike Cestus) Self-slow: 25% → 40% 0 charge damage: 175 → 155 1 charge damage: 185 → 165 2 charge damage: 195 → 175 3 charge damage: 205 → 185

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.description: Following recent buffs, we are happy with the adoption of Armor of Valor as a powerful defensive option with unique utility. However, tank items should not provide high CC, strong defenses, and significant damage in a single ability. The amount of damage it could return, particularly in 1v1 fights, was too high.

items.text: Requite (Armor of Valor)

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Following recent buffs, we are happy with the adoption of Armor of Valor as a powerful defensive option with unique utility. However, tank items should not provide high CC, strong defenses, and significant damage in a single ability. The amount of damage it could return, particularly in 1v1 fights, was too high. Requite (Armor of Valor) Damage: 46 → 31

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.description: Mage Sandals have fallen out of favor in modern Albion, so we have added a new resistance buff upon landing. Additionally, changes have been made to make it harder for enemies to predict the exact landing location.

items.text: Delayed Teleport (Mage Sandals)

subitems.text: Now increases resistances by 0.2 for 2s after landing
No longer shows the exact ending position VFX to enemies

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Mage Sandals have fallen out of favor in modern Albion, so we have added a new resistance buff upon landing. Additionally, changes have been made to make it harder for enemies to predict the exact landing location. Delayed Teleport (Mage Sandals) Now increases resistances by 0.2 for 2s after landing No longer shows the exact ending position VFX to enemies

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.description: Tanks have been using Morgana Ravens as an additional CC option, overwhelming large groups of players by chaining long-duration fears. We have made changes to Raven Scream to address these issues.

items.text: Raven Scream (Morgana Raven)

subitems.text: Now gives feared targets immunity to consecutive Raven fears for 15s
No longer inherits the rider’s bonus CC duration

items.text: Reactive Scream (Morgana Raven)

subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Tanks have been using Morgana Ravens as an additional CC option, overwhelming large groups of players by chaining long-duration fears. We have made changes to Raven Scream to address these issues. Raven Scream (Morgana Raven) Now gives feared targets immunity to consecutive Raven fears for 15s No longer inherits the rider’s bonus CC duration Reactive Scream (Morgana Raven) Removed

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.description: The recent change to potion swapping has made using Fish Bait inconvenient, so we have changed the way it is consumed.

items.text: Fish Bait (all Tiers)

subitems.text: Fish Bait is now consumable from inventory, rather than as a potion
If a character had Fish Bait equipped in the potion slot prior to this patch, this will need to be removed before it can be used from the inventory

subsections.searchable_text: Potions The recent change to potion swapping has made using Fish Bait inconvenient, so we have changed the way it is consumed. Fish Bait (all Tiers) Fish Bait is now consumable from inventory, rather than as a potion If a character had Fish Bait equipped in the potion slot prior to this patch, this will need to be removed before it can be used from the inventory

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots): Fixed issue where the active charge count VFX did not display correctly
Hellfire Potion: Fixed issue where it reduced healing cast instead of healing received

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots): Fixed issue where the active charge count VFX did not display correctly Hellfire Potion: Fixed issue where it reduced healing cast instead of healing received

subsections.heading: Salvaging Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where certain items would have a lower salvage value than intended
Fixed issue where non-salvageable items would display a salvage value

subsections.searchable_text: Salvaging Fixes Fixed issue where certain items would have a lower salvage value than intended Fixed issue where non-salvageable items would display a salvage value

subsections.heading: Mob Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Keeper Bear and Giant mobs could knock players out of combat range, causing them to reset
Fixed issue where the Morgana Fang boss would stand still while casting Splitting Claw

subsections.searchable_text: Mob Fixes Fixed issue where Keeper Bear and Giant mobs could knock players out of combat range, causing them to reset Fixed issue where the Morgana Fang boss would stand still while casting Splitting Claw

subsections.heading: Albion Journal Fixes

items.text: Restored progress towards the mission ‘Have the offspring of every type of animal’ that was lost with Horizons Patch 2
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Deliver a Weakened Wisp in Lethal Mists’ could not be completed in Greater Mists
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Directly sell 9999 preferred luxury goods to Caerleon’ would only count those sold in one of Caerleon’s Marketplaces
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Raise a Tier 7 Mount’ could be completed by raising a pig
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Get your very own island’ could be completed by having any type of island in your island list
Fixed issue where ‘Kill or assist in killing players within one minute’ missions would not count assists
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Have 2 offspring from a single horse’ could not be completed
Changed mission ‘Reach Guild Challenge Level 100 with your Guild’ to ‘Reach Guild Challenge Level 99 with your Guild’

subsections.searchable_text: Albion Journal Fixes Restored progress towards the mission ‘Have the offspring of every type of animal’ that was lost with Horizons Patch 2 Fixed issue where the mission ‘Deliver a Weakened Wisp in Lethal Mists’ could not be completed in Greater Mists Fixed issue where the mission ‘Directly sell 9999 preferred luxury goods to Caerleon’ would only count those sold in one of Caerleon’s Marketplaces Fixed issue where the mission ‘Raise a Tier 7 Mount’ could be completed by raising a pig Fixed issue where the mission ‘Get your very own island’ could be completed by having any type of island in your island list Fixed issue where ‘Kill or assist in killing players within one minute’ missions would not count assists Fixed issue where the mission ‘Have 2 offspring from a single horse’ could not be completed Changed mission ‘Reach Guild Challenge Level 100 with your Guild’ to ‘Reach Guild Challenge Level 99 with your Guild’

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
